message:
feat(phase2c): expand compat-closure evidence packs FP-P2C-006 through FP-P2C-011

Add six new compat-closure evidence directories (FP-P2C-006 through
FP-P2C-011), each containing:
- compat_closure_e2e_scenarios.json: end-to-end scenario definitions
  with expected pandas-compatible outputs
- differential_validation_log.jsonl: line-by-line differential
  comparison between frankenpandas and reference pandas behavior
- fault_injection_validation.json: fault-injection test results
  verifying graceful degradation under corrupted/malformed inputs

Updated existing phase2c artifacts:
- compat_closure_attestation_summary.json: update summary counts to
  reflect 6 additional evidence packs
- compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json: expand the evidence index
  with all new pack references and validation timestamps
- compat_closure_migration_manifest.json: bump manifest version

Documentation:
- FEATURE_PARITY.md: update parity status table with newly validated
  API families and close 5 previously-open gaps
- README.md: minor wording update for accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
